calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-04-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Petitioner: John Mulqueen present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
Clerical error: matter is scheduled for May 6, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, by the Clerk's Office in error.
Notice of Hearing date of May 4, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, published in The Recorder. Without any opposition, this matter is heard in Dept. 218 at 9:00 a.m. today.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: John Baldini.
Decree signed in open court.
